definition:
γένος, -ους, τό 
 (γίγνομαι), [in LXX for עַם, מִין, זֶרַע, etc. ;] 
   1. family: Act.4:6 7:13 13:26. 
   2. offspring: Act.17:28, 29 Rev.22:16. 
   3. race, nation; Mrk.7:28, Act.4:36 7:19 18:2, 24, 2Co.11:26, Php.3:5, Gal.1:14, 1Pe.2:9. 
   4. kind, sort, class: Mat.13:47 17:21, Rec., Mrk.9:29, 1Co.12:10, 28 14:10.
† (AS)
